human_task_name: SynAIpse CC2 exact admitted patch adversarial review
objective: Adversarially challenge the exact admitted CC2 source patch for compatibility regressions, malformed or ambiguous failure envelopes, reader bypasses, and unsafe decision-stop semantics without editing source or Git.

decision_frame.value: Obtain fresh adversarial evidence against the exact target and staged patch pair after accepted Worker and QA lanes.
decision_frame.why_now: CC2 changes a public versioned failure envelope and compatibility readers; the consequential review plan requires an adversarial lane after QA acceptance.
acceptance_criteria: HEAD remains 8aa5e406f49c84ba04fa39e628d9d8f5a3ea35c8 and the staged patch digest remains 1d4ed517e6cdf2cdee3065c812049cfa91befc60d3e172dbbb3442aed4665afe.
Attempt to falsify the producer-reader compatibility, envelope versioning, required-context blocking, malformed input handling, and legacy reader behavior.
Return accepted only when no reproducible adversarial defect remains; otherwise return rejected with assertion-shaped findings.

Write the declared pm-child-result/v1 artifact and handoff, binding Worker result SHA 479de4531c6eedf6139aaedb1ae649e64d7c43246b8235d12dd1987afe9309e0 and QA result SHA 13ed4e0b295df2d05fe6e1264d8f661579701a78c86cf019657fc1526243a856.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Detect compatibility or fail-open behavior that focused tests may not exercise.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One fresh read-only adversarial review against the exact target/staged-patch pair.

review_plan.adversarial_review_rationale: CC2 changes a public versioned failure envelope and compatibility readers, so independent disproof and adversarial review are required before any source commit.

non_goals: Do not edit source, tests, contracts, packets, or existing evidence.
Do not stage, commit, push, create or update a PR, mutate hosted state, or clean any worktree.
Do not claim Worker acceptance, QA acceptance, fan-in, hosted checks, hosted review, human acceptance, merge, release, or production readiness.

validation_entrypoints: MISE_NO_CONFIG=1 pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/context-plane.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts --maxWorkers=1 --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Run read-only review commands and write only the declared Adversarial artifacts.
